data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'No-show identification', which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that demonstrates how the system identifies no-shows, nor are there any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. This lack of evidence indicates a clear gap in meeting the requirement for no-show identification.
gaps: No evidence of implementation for no-show identification.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for no-show identification
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the no-show identification functionality.
